subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1915-04-27
subcodes.first_line: Amongst the believers of God there must exist the utmost cooperation, equality and the solidarity of rights. Through their deeds and lives
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator, @unity; oneness of humanity, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world
